title: FinalVerifierOutput
description: Structured output produced by the `final_verifier` provider_step. Replaces the previous practice of writing only a markdown `## final_verification` section to current-note.md and having close_gate parse the AC table back out of that markdown. The engine reads ac_verification[] directly from the judgement sidecar — never re-parses the prose.

ac_verification.description: One entry per Acceptance Criterion in the ticket. Order matches the ticket's AC list. The engine reads .status to drive close_gate's deferral_approvals requirement (any `unverified` row demands a deferral plan).

summary_md.description: Full human-readable verification narrative — the same prose that previously made up the `## final_verification (round N)` section in current-note.md. Rendered as-is when surfaced; the FE never re-parses this string for data. The summary should still include an AC verification table (humans read it), but the table is presentation only — the engine source of truth is `ac_verification[]`.

ac_item.description: Verbatim text of the AC bullet from current-ticket.md `## Acceptance Criteria`.

class.description: Verification class carried forward from the assist / plan section.

status.description: Verification verdict. `verified` requires concrete evidence (file path in `evidence_path`); `unverified` MUST be paired with a deferral plan at close_gate (`deferral_approvals` in the gate decision); `user_accepted` is reserved for Epic-level review and rarely appears here.

evidence_path.description: Relative path (from worktree root) to the evidence file that proves this AC. Omit when status is `unverified` / `user_accepted`.

note.description: One-line context for the row — why unverified / what was checked / what gap remains. Surfaced to the close_gate human.
